title: Cognitive Data Format
description: A token that carries its own accumulated meanings. Like a dictionary entry that grows over time as new contexts are discovered — each meaning is a track, added without overwriting what came before.

token.description: The word or concept being defined

tracks.description: The accumulated meanings of this token across all contexts it exists in

context.description: The domain or field this meaning belongs to e.g. agriculture, technology, geography

meaning.description: Plain language definition of the token in this context

added.description: When this meaning was added — first (original meaning) or accumulated (added over time)

source.description: Where this meaning came from e.g. wikidata, user, llm

frequency.description: Estimated proportion of real-world usage for this meaning — 0.0 to 1.0
